title: Issue with create_update mutation

posts.author: carlosdelgado (Carlos Delgado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m facing an issue with this mutation:

mutation saveUpdate ($item_ids:Int, $body: String){
  create_update (item_id: $item_ids, body: $body) {
    id
    text_body
    body
    created_at
  }
}

And the answer I’m getting is:

{
  "errors": [
    {
      "message": "An operation name is required"
    }
  ],
  "account_id": XXXXXX
}

What am I doing wrong?

Thanks
Carlos

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: If you change saveUpdate to create_update, does that resolve the issue?

posts.author: carlosdelgado (Carlos Delgado)
posts.cookedHtml:
kolaai:

create_update

Nope, it’s still the same. Thanks for the suggestion in any case!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Strange. You might want to write to app support so that they can look into the issue

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

Matias here!

This is strange.

I just tried this mutation in my Playground and it worked for me.

image1098×220 28.2 KB

Could you try hardcoding the IDs instead of using variables?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
